rationale: B is closer to the actual Flink source layout: `JobVertexWatermarksHandler` and its test live under `flink-runtime/.../job/metrics/`. A misplaces the handler under `job/` and stays too generic. B’s docs anchors are weak and some neighboring tests are off-target, but it still names the correct implementation and regression surfaces.

A: Misplaces the handler under `flink-runtime/.../handler/job/` instead of the actual `.../handler/job/metrics/` package.
Neighboring tests are only loosely related and miss the metrics-package context around the real handler.
Does not give a concrete version-pinned docs URI.
B: Docs citations use unsupported `#part-0001/#part-0002` fragments and do not clearly anchor the watermarks section.
Several cited neighboring tests are unrelated to watermark REST handling, weakening the anchor set.
`repo://` source URIs may not be usable as normal review citations in a Flink engineering context.
